displayName: 上海师范大学研究生学位论文规范示例（文科）公开来源试点

publicSourceAttestations.path: source-documents/上海师范大学研究生学位论文规范示例（文科）(2)(2).docx
publicSourceAttestations.publicAccessBasis: Repository owner confirmed in-session that this SHNU sample document may be public in examples.
publicSourceAttestations.notes: Only the public source DOCX and derived template fixtures are committed. Generated DOCX/PDF artifacts, package zips, raw extraction text, private thesis content, and font binaries remain excluded.

knownGaps.title: Dynamic chapter-name header
knownGaps.impact: The source asks for chapter-name headers; the current public template renders a deterministic centered header text.
knownGaps.tracking: Implement section-instance header overrides or dynamic header fields.

knownGaps.title: Professional-degree cover variant
knownGaps.impact: The public template covers the academic-degree cover; the professional-degree variant is recorded but not conditionally rendered.
knownGaps.tracking: Add template variant selection or conditional page-template blocks.

knownGaps.title: Appendix A/B/C numbering
knownGaps.impact: Appendix heading shape is covered, but appendix-specific figure/table/equation numbering is not fully modeled.
knownGaps.tracking: Extend section-aware numbering rules for appendix sections.

acceptance.notes: Machine acceptance means the public-source example passes deterministic privacy, render, conformance, regression, baseline, and package gates. Human format review is still required before changing reviewStatus to humanAccepted.

status.notes: Public-source real-institution example. Human format review is still required before treating the template as accepted.
